notes: Expanded moderation terms and regex patterns used for local pre-checks before AI moderation. The list is broad and grouped by severity, but intentionally still uses AI for context-heavy minor and major matches.

minor.notes: Bypass spellings of casual profanity; AI should decide whether context makes it disruptive or targeted.
Low-grade insults; AI checks whether they are targeted, playful, or disruptive.

patterns: \b(?:shut up|shutup|stfu|be quiet|nobody asked|who asked|no one asked|dont care|do not care|cry about it|keep crying|stay mad|get lost|get over it|skill issue|cope|seethe|mald|ratio|touch grass|go outside|leave chat|stop talking|stop yapping|yap harder|yapper|muted|ignored|blocked)\b
minor.notes: Dismissive or baiting phrasing that can be harmless or hostile depending on context.

patterns: \b(?:drama|bait|ragebait|flamebait|trolling|troll|toxic|toxicity|salty|salted|mad cuz bad|stay salty|ez clap|ez win|too easy|get owned|get rekt|rekt|owned|folded|cooked|washed|trash talk|trash-talk|trashtalk|clapped|destroyed you|free win|free kill)\b
minor.notes: Competitive or drama phrases that may need AI context.

patterns: \b(?:spam|spamming|flood|flooding|ping spam|mass ping|mass mention|everyone ping|ghost ping|copypasta|copy pasta|chain message|chainmail|raid ping|advertise|advertising|self promo|self-promo|promote my|join my server|join my discord|follow my|sub to me|subscribe to me|free robux|free nitro|nitro drop|giveaway scam)\b
minor.notes: Disruptive language, spam indicators, and repeated symbols/caps.

patterns: \b(?:date me|dating|edate|e-date|edating|e-dating|boyfriend|girlfriend|bf|gf|babe|baby girl|babygirl|babyboy|hubby|wifey|wife me|marry me|love you|ily|i love you|luv u|kiss me|kissing|cuddle|cuddling|hug me|hold hands|romance|romantic|rizz|rizzing|flirt|flirting|crush on you|my crush|valentine|sweetheart|darling|dear lover|aishitemasu|aishiteru|suki desu|daisuki|te amo|mi amor|mahal kita|saranghae)\b
minor.notes: Romantic wording can be normal or e-dating depending on context.

patterns: \b(?:sus|sussy|down bad|horny|thirsty|thirst trap|hot pics|spicy pic|spicy pictures|send pic|send pics|body count|smash or pass|would smash|rizz me|mommy|daddy|step bro|step sis|ayo pause|pause that|freaky|freaky ahh|gyatt|cake|cheeks|booty|booba|milkies)\b
minor.notes: Soft NSFW slang should be judged by AI because context varies.

patterns: \b(?:politics|political|election|vote for|voting for|president|prime minister|congress|senate|parliament|government|democrat|republican|liberal|conservative|leftist|right wing|left wing|communist|socialist|capitalist|fascist|marxist|maga|biden|trump|obama|putin|zelensky|israel|palestine|gaza|ukraine war|culture war|abortion debate|gun control|immigration debate)\b
minor.notes: Political topics are routed to AI to distinguish casual mention from prohibited discussion.
Religious terms are routed to AI to separate ordinary reference from debate or harassment.

patterns: \b(?:weirdo|creep|creepy|psycho|crazy|insane|mental|schizo|delusional|autistic as insult|sped|special ed|slow kid|short bus|npc|bot behavior|fatherless|motherless|orphan behavior|no life|nolife|basement dweller|neckbeard|incel|simp|white knight)\b
minor.notes: Identity-adjacent insults should be context checked.
Common insults in multiple languages; AI can translate and judge severity.

patterns: \b(?:you(?:'| a)?re|you are|ur|u are)\s+(?:a\s+)?(?:bitch|idiot|moron|loser|clown|trash|garbage|pathetic|worthless|useless|dumbass|asshole|failure|mistake|embarrassment|disgrace|waste of space|waste of oxygen)\b
\b(?:shut the fuck up|stupid ass|dumb ass|bitch ass|punk ass|trash ass|get the fuck out|go fuck yourself|go away forever|nobody likes you|everyone hates you)\b
major.notes: Direct targeted abuse. AI checks context and severity before enforcement.

patterns: \b(?:bully|bullying|harass|harassing|harassment|stalk|stalking|stalker|dogpile|dogpiling|target them|mass report|mass-report|witch hunt|witchhunt|pile on|jump him|jump her|jump them|make fun of|mock them|laugh at them|humiliate|humiliated|embarrass them|ruin their day|make them cry|keep bullying|keep harassing|follow them around)\b

major.notes: Explicit sexual content or bypass spellings.

patterns: \b(?:send nudes|send nude|send pics|send body pic|send lewds|send feet|dm nudes|trade nudes|show me your body|show your body|show boobs|show tits|show ass|show pussy|show dick|rate my body|rate my dick|rate my boobs|horny dm|sex chat|sext|sexting|dirty talk|roleplay sex|erp|erping|do you moan|are you a virgin|body reveal|face reveal for nudes|nudes for nitro|nudes for robux)\b
major.notes: Requests or offers for sexual content.

patterns: \b(?:be my girlfriend|be my boyfriend|be my gf|be my bf|looking for gf|looking for bf|need a girlfriend|need a boyfriend|single and looking|discord dating|dating server|edating server|date in dms|dm me to date|kiss you|make out|sleep with me|cuddle in vc|romantic rp|relationship rp|couple rp|marry me in game|online girlfriend|online boyfriend)\b

patterns: \b(?:i will hurt you|i will beat you|i will find you|i will jump you|i will smack you|i will slap you|i will punch you|i will destroy you|watch your back|sleep with one eye open|you are dead|youre dead|dead man walking|catch these hands|pull up on you|run your pockets|beat your ass|knock you out|break your jaw|break your face)\b
major.notes: Threats or intimidation. AI should judge credibility and context.

\b(?:libtard|magat|trumptard|commie scum|nazi voter|fascist pig|religion is cancer|your god is fake|burn the bible|burn the quran|burn the koran|all atheists are evil|all christians are stupid|all muslims are terrorists|all jews control|convert or die|infidel dog|heretic|heathen trash)\b

\b(?:dox|doxx|doxing|doxxing|leak your address|leak his address|leak her address|leak their address|drop address|drop your address|post your address|find your ip|grab your ip|ip grab|ip logger|ip pull|pull your ip|track your location|find where you live|send your address|what is your address|real name leak|phone number leak)\b

\b(?:token grabber|token logger|account stealer|cookie logger|cookie stealer|password grabber|password stealer|malware|rat tool|remote access trojan|keylogger|grabify|phishing link|phish link|fake login|fake nitro|free nitro generator|robux generator|steam gift scam|wallet drainer|crypto drainer|seed phrase|recovery phrase|send your password|give me your password|login for you)\b

patterns: \b(?:how old are you|are you underage|are you a minor|age check|you sound young|young girl|young boy|teen girl|teen boy|loli|shota|jailbait|minor gf|minor girlfriend|minor boyfriend|underage gf|underage girlfriend|underage boyfriend)\b

patterns: \b(?:raid this server|server raid|raid them|raid it|nuke server|nuke this server|mass dm|mass ping them|mass report them|brigade|brigading|spam their chat|flood their chat|join and spam|crash the server|destroy the server|delete channels|delete all channels|ban everyone|kick everyone)\b

patterns: \b(?:blackmail|extort|extortion|expose you|expose your dms|leak your dms|leak your pics|leak your photos|send money or|pay me or|do this or i leak|i will leak|i will expose|i have screenshots|i have your pics|i have your address|i have your ip)\b

patterns: \b(?:i am going to kill you|im going to kill you|i will kill you|ill kill you|i'm gonna kill you|i will murder you|i am going to murder you|i will shoot you|i am going to shoot you|i will stab you|i am going to stab you|i will bomb|shoot up|school shooter|bring a gun|plant a bomb|bomb threat|death threat|execute you|slit your throat|cut your throat|burn you alive)\b

patterns: \b(?:chink|gook|spic|wetback|beaner|coon|jigaboo|porch monkey|sand nigger|raghead|towelhead|gypsy slur|zipperhead|cracker as slur|whitey as slur|monkey as racial insult|ape as racial insult)\b

\b(?:retard|tard|spaz|cripple as insult|mongoloid|downie|autist as insult|sped as slur|vegetable as insult|subhuman|not human|vermin|parasite people|inferior race)\b
